name: attack-monorepo
description: 0x13d::att&ck Browser EDR — the community rule set (rules/, published as 0x13d-attack-rules-community), the MV3 extension (apps/extension), the shared rule schema (packages/rule-schema), and the VS Code authoring tool (apps/vscode).

scripts.prepare: npm run build -w @attack/rule-schema && npm run build -w 0x13d-attack-rules-community
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @attack/rule-schema && npm run typecheck -w 0x13d-attack-rules-community && npm run typecheck -w attack-extension
